product_updates.title: Publisher pulls horror novel ‘Shy Girl’ over AI concerns
product_updates.content: Hachette Book Group said it will not be publishing “Shy Girl” over concerns that artificial intelligence was used to generate the text.

product_updates.title: Delve accused of misleading customers with ‘fake compliance’
product_updates.content: An anonymous Substack post accuses compliance startup Delve of “falsely” convincing “hundreds of customers they were compliant” with privacy and security regulations.

product_updates.title: Why Wall Street wasn’t won over by Nvidia’s big conference
product_updates.content: Despite investor fears of an AI bubble, Nvidia's latest conference shows that most in the industry aren't concerned by that possibility.

product_updates.title: New court filing reveals Pentagon told Anthropic the two sides were nearly aligned — a week after Trump declared the relationship kaput
product_updates.content: Anthropic submitted two sworn declarations to a California federal court late Friday afternoon, pushing back on the Pentagon's assertion that the AI company poses an "unacceptable risk to national security" and arguing that the government's case relies on technical misunderstandings and claims th…
